all_candidates.topic: Should government control fuel prices despite global fluctuations?
all_candidates.news_anchor: The Oil Minister indicated last week, around July 4, 2026, that lowering domestic fuel prices was not currently under consideration despite easing crude prices, implying a controlled approach.

all_candidates.topic: Should NEET and JEE exams be merged into one single test?
all_candidates.news_anchor: A potential merger of NEET and JEE into a 'One Nation, One Exam' framework is proposed, discussed on July 2-3, 2026, by the Ministry of Education and NTA.

all_candidates.topic: Should India's fuel prices decrease despite stable crude?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Petrol and diesel prices across India remained steady on July 11, 2026, despite easing crude oil rates, and the Oil Minister indicated last week that lowering domestic fuel prices was not currently under consideration.

all_candidates.topic: Is E20 petrol's higher cost justified by energy security?
all_candidates.news_anchor: The Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas clarified on July 10-11, 2026, why E20 petrol is not cheaper than pure petrol, citing higher domestic ethanol procurement costs at current crude prices.

all_candidates.topic: Are AI-driven layoffs in India beneficial for tech sector growth?
all_candidates.news_anchor: India emerged as the second-most affected nation globally by AI-driven tech layoffs in the first half of 2026, as reported on July 6-9, 2026.

all_candidates.topic: Should individuals bear full responsibility for AI upskilling?
all_candidates.news_anchor: A report on July 6, 2026, warned India could face a shortage of 14 lakh AI professionals by the end of 2026 if workers do not rapidly upskill.

all_candidates.topic: Should banks be fully liable for digital fraud losses?
all_candidates.news_anchor: RBI's new draft directions, effective July 1, 2026, propose safeguards and compensation mechanisms for digital fraud, but not full bank liability for all cases.

all_candidates.topic: Is RBI's new digital fraud compensation sufficient for consumers?
all_candidates.news_anchor: The RBI issued draft Third Amendment Directions, 2026, effective July 1, 2026, proposing a compensation mechanism for small-value digital frauds (up to ₹25,000 for losses up to ₹50,000).

all_candidates.topic: Should Delhi's winter WFH mandate become a permanent policy?
all_candidates.news_anchor: The Delhi government directed public and private employers to limit office attendance to 50% during winter months (November 1 - January 31) to tackle air pollution, as reported on July 4, 2026.

all_candidates.topic: Should NEET-UG shift to online computer-based testing?
all_candidates.news_anchor: A shift of NEET-UG from pen-and-paper to Computer-Based Testing (CBT) mode is proposed, discussed on July 2-3, 2026.

all_candidates.topic: Are reduced credit card benefits fair to loyal customers?
all_candidates.news_anchor: HDFC Bank and SBI Card tightened credit card perks and restructured reward points, effective July 1, 2026.

all_candidates.topic: Does mandatory UPI 2FA enhance user security effectively?
all_candidates.news_anchor: UPI transactions now require mandatory two-factor authentication (2FA) from April 1, 2026, as part of new RBI and NPCI security upgrades.

all_candidates.topic: Will new RBI mis-selling rules protect bank customers effectively?
all_candidates.news_anchor: The Reserve Bank of India's new consumer protection framework against mis-selling of financial products became effective July 1, 2026, mandating banks to ensure product suitability.

all_candidates.topic: Should banks be legally mandated to align product recommendations?
all_candidates.news_anchor: RBI implemented a new consumer protection framework from July 1, 2026, mandating banks to ensure financial products align with customer profiles.

all_candidates.topic: Is the 20-transaction daily UPI limit restrictive?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Many UPI users can make up to 20 successful UPI payments in 24 hours for standard person-to-person transfers, as clarified in articles from July 1, 2026.

all_candidates.topic: Is the increased passport application fee justifiable?
all_candidates.news_anchor: The Ministry of External Affairs updated passport service charges, making them more expensive from July 1, 2026.

all_candidates.topic: Is Delhi's electric bus expansion sufficient for cleaner air?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Delhi deployed 300 electric buses and aims for 7,000 by end of 2026 as part of its EV Policy, reported on July 9, 2026.

all_candidates.topic: Is staggering ITR filing deadlines beneficial for taxpayers?
all_candidates.news_anchor: The CBDT modified Income Tax Return (ITR) filing deadlines for AY 2026-27 with staggered timelines, effective July 1, 2026.

all_candidates.topic: Is limiting UPI balance checks per day justified for stability?
all_candidates.news_anchor: NPCI refined operational norms from August 2025, with full influence on 2026, limiting UPI balance checks to 50 per app per day to reduce server load.

all_candidates.topic: Will new transport policies increase truck operating costs unfairly?
all_candidates.news_anchor: India is introducing several transport reforms that may increase truck operating costs in the short term, as reported on July 6, 2026.
